text: Key risks include ongoing antitrust litigation, with the U.S. government and a majority of U.S. states filing an appeal in the Google search antitrust case as of February 2026. A federal court judge ruled in 2024 that Google holds a monopoly in the online search business, though the toughest remedies were rejected. Management quality is reflected through CEO Sundar Pichai's leadership of 185,719 full-time employees. The Department of Justice and state attorneys general have not provided specific details about their appeal in court documents.
